use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in SaaS applications and landing pages
Destructive action buttons for delete, remove, or cancel operations
Multi-step form navigation with consistent button styling
Dashboard interface action triggers with icon support
Themed button systems with variant switching for dark/light modes
ai_summary: A flexible React button component with 9 visual variants (primary, mono, destructive, secondary, outline, dashed, ghost, dim, inverse) built with class-variance-authority for type-safe variant composition. Features smooth hover transitions, focus-visible states, icon slot support via Radix UI Slot, and conditional arrow display. Supports multiple sizes and provides consistent styling across SaaS applications, dashboards, and form-heavy interfaces with both dark and light theme support.
